name: Low-Fat Tamale Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Masa harina or corn meal
The rest of the ingredients (corn & chiles)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sauté onions, chicken, and garlic in a non-stick pan over medium heat until tender.
2. If necessary, add a small amount of water to prevent sticking; no oil is required.
3. Add zucchini, corn, green chiles, canned tomatoes, and seasonings (chile powder, cumin, salt, and pepper). Cook for an additional 5-10 minutes until all ingredients are well combined.
4. In a bowl, mix dry ingredients: masa harina or corn meal, flour, baking powder, and salt.
5. Add wet ingredients (milk, egg) to the dry mixture and stir until just blended.
6. Pour the filling into an ungreased casserole dish.
7. Sprinkle the cheese evenly over the top of the filling.
8. Bake at 350°F for about 20 minutes or until bubbling thoroughly.
